# Pull Request

## What Changed

Describe the change in plain language.

## Why

What banality, bug, documentation gap, or agentic ceremony does this reduce?

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Satirical infrastructure with practical value

## Checklist

- [ ] I mocked systems, not people.
- [ ] I avoided LinkedIn influencer tone.
- [ ] I kept the technical point intact.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs when user-facing behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not add confidential data, secrets, or customer specifics.
- [ ] I avoided direct vendor attacks while preserving appropriate enterprise despair.

## Verification

Commands run:

```bash
npm test
npm run build
```

If not run, explain why.
